backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the FarmSiddhi backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for user profiles, contact form submissions, product details, and orders, with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that seeds default product data (rice, wheat, pulses, spices, processed-food-products, makhana) into the product map while preserving existing products during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (cart context, order hooks, product-by-category fix, etc.) to their affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing 1–2 sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a build-planning reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FarmSiddhi React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with 11 routes (including /cart, /checkout, /order-confirmation/$orderId), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and CartProvider, and renders a shared Navigation/Footer layout with lazy-loaded page components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the FarmSiddhi logo, contact info, social media links (LinkedIn, X, Facebook), and a copyright bar with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, and a cart icon with item count badge using the CartContext.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state management with add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations, plus derived cartTotal and itemCount values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, contact forms, product details, orders, and related mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens, base body styles, and utility component classes like section-container and watermark-container.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: Static About Us page displaying FarmSiddhi's vision, mission, and business model in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing orders and contact form submissions, with tabs for viewing/updating order statuses and seeding a product catalog.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls, line totals, and a checkout navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with a form for buyer details and shipping address that submits an order via the usePlaceOrder hook and redirects to order confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact Us page with a form for name, email, phone, user type, and message that submits to the backend via useSubmitContactForm and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/Exports.tsx: Displays the Export Services page with a grid of service cards (quality assurance, packaging, logistics, global trade, compliance) and an international certifications section.
frontend/src/pages/FarmerNetwork.tsx: Renders the Farmer Network page showcasing services like direct procurement, fair pricing, and supply chain digitization, along with a benefits section for farmers.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Implements the homepage with a hero section, platform introduction, services overview, and a product grid linking to individual product pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows an order confirmation page after checkout, loading order details from sessionStorage and displaying order ID, status, items, and customer info.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Renders a product detail page for a given category, supporting variant selection, quantity adjustment, and add-to-cart functionality with category-mapped images.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Displays a grid of six agricultural product categories (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana) as linked cards with images, highlights, and badges. Each card navigates to a detailed product category page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radius, box shadows, Inter font family, and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the FarmSiddhi corporate website project at version 61, documenting architecture decisions, known issues (broken e-commerce cart, admin page, product detail pages), and a list of implemented features.
